channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jacqui Chan's Career and Relationship with Anthony Armstrong-Jones
item.description: This article explores the life and career of Trinidad-born British actress Jacqui Chan, focusing on her 1956 encounter with photographer Anthony Armstrong-Jones in Venice. Chan, then 18, was a dancer ...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Threatens to Leave Coalition if Sifuna Is Overlooked
item.description: Cleophas Malala, deputy leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party, has hinted at leaving the United Opposition if Senator Edwin Sifuna is not given a key position. Malala emphasized the need for Luhy...

item.title: Windsor Police Locate Missing Woman After Search
item.description: Windsor police have successfully located a woman who was reported missing earlier this week. The incident, which has been widely covered in local media, highlights the importance of community cooperat...

item.title: Tanzania's Plan to Transform DITF into Global Innovation and Trade Hub by 2050
item.description: The Tanzanian government has unveiled a plan to reposition the Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF) as a world-class innovation and technology hub by 2050. This initiative, announced during t...

item.title: Joint Operation Uproots P6-M Marijuana Plants in Agusan del Sur

item.title: EFF Leader Julius Malema Allegedly Attempted Arrest of Operation Dudula Members via WhatsApp Messages

item.title: UK Homeowners Face Higher Mortgage Rates Amid Economic Uncertainty
item.description: A million additional UK homeowners are projected to encounter elevated mortgage costs compared to Bank of England forecasts, primarily due to the geopolitical tensions stemming from the Iran conflict....

item.title: ECP Urges Prompt Action to Resolve Delays in Local Government Elections in KP and Islamabad

item.description: The Philippine Army, in collaboration with local authorities and relief organizations, has been actively constructing temporary shelters for earthquake victims in Sarangani. The efforts aim to provide...

item.title: Supercars Appoints Nick Raman as New Head of Communications
item.description: Supercars has finalized the hiring of Nick Raman, previously BMW Australia's communications manager, to fill the vacant head of communications role. Raman will join the company on August 4, replacing ...

item.title: Australia concerned over China's South Pacific missile tests and regional security implications
item.description: China's recent nuclear-capable missile test in the South Pacific has raised significant concerns among Australian officials, highlighting perceived strategic shifts by Beijing. The launch occurred jus...

item.title: IOC Delays Judgment on Tanzanian Olympic Election Dispute
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) is holding off on commenting on the controversial Tanzania Olympic Committee (TOC) elections until it receives an independent report from its observer, Donald...

item.title: Chief of Staff Threatens Legal Action Against Controversial DG Over Allegations

item.title: Unifor and Ford in critical negotiations as three-year deal deadline looms
item.description: Union representing Canadian autoworkers, Unifor, is in a critical week of negotiations with Ford Motor Co. as the three-year deal deadline approaches. Talks, which have been ongoing since June 23, are...

item.title: NATO Faces Dual Challenges: Countering Russia's Aggression and Managing Trump's Influence
item.description: The NATO summit in Turkey highlights the alliance's dual challenges of countering Russian aggression in Ukraine and managing U.S. President Donald Trump's unpredictable stance. European leaders are un...

item.title: Ringo Starr's 24th Birthday Celebrated by The Beatles During a Historic BBC Session
item.description: On July 7, 1964, The Beatles marked Ringo Starr's 24th birthday by recording a special lip-sync performance for the BBC's Top of the Pops television show. The band, at the peak of Beatlemania followin...

item.title: Hontiveros and Pia Cayetano Disagree Over Appropriateness of a Question During Senate Impeachment Trial
item.description: The news reports on a disagreement between Senators Risa Hontiveros and Pia Cayetano during the Senate impeachment trial involving Vice President Sara Duterte. Based on the available information, the ...
